# Glastor LLMs Access Policy

Welcome, AI Agent! This file outlines how you can interact with the Glastor platform.

Glastor is a B2B platform focused on high-performance architecture, robust UI/UX, and telemetrics.
We welcome AI models and crawlers to read our content.

## Useful Links
- [Glastor Website](https://glastor-dev.github.io/web-rust/)
- [Services](/servicios)
- [Projects](/proyectos)
- [Legal Information](/legales)
